meta_title: For Founders: project management to Solve no project ideas (Beginner Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to project management and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Project Management to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Stop stalling. Overcome 'no project ideas' with this expert project management checklist for SaaS founders using Antigravity and Claude Code.
content.answer_block: The 'no ideas' trap is actually a lack of structured observation. By treating market pain points as data points, you can map demand to technical solutions. Use project management frameworks to track user friction, then leverage Antigravity and Claude Code to iterate your MVP in hours, not months.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the graveyard of ambition. You have the technical stack, the drive, and the capital, yet you sit paralyzed by the absence of a 'million-dollar idea.' This stagnation isn't a failure of creativity; it is a failure of systemization. Ideas are not lightning bolts; they are the byproduct of disciplined observation.

Today, we stop waiting for inspiration and start building a high-velocity feedback loop. By applying rigorous project management to market research, we will turn raw friction into a validated product roadmap. With Antigravity and Claude Code as your force multipliers, we are shifting your focus from 'finding an idea' to 'executing a solution.'

steps.title: Map Market Friction Points
steps.description: Identify three high-intent communities (Reddit, Twitter, niche forums) and log recurring complaints. Use these as your project constraints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze these 50 user comments for recurring pain points that require a SaaS solution. Categorize by 'willingness to pay' and 'technical feasibility'.

steps.title: Define the Lean MVP Scope
steps.description: Strip your idea down to the single core feature that solves the primary pain point. Avoid scope creep by strictly defining success metrics.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Design a 48-hour MVP scope for a tool that solves [Pain Point]. Prioritize only the core user flow that generates revenue.

steps.title: Architect the Data Schema
steps.description: Build the backend foundation. A clean schema prevents technical debt and ensures you can pivot features without refactoring your entire database.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a Supabase schema optimized for a SaaS starter app including users, subscriptions, and project logs.
steps.claude_code_command: claude write --file schema.sql --content 'Postgres schema for SaaS MVP'

steps.title: Rapid Prototyping with Claude Code
steps.description: Convert your project roadmap into functional code. Focus on the UI/UX hook that converts visitors into users.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write the React frontend component for the main dashboard MVP. Focus on minimalist design and high-conversion CTA placement.

steps.title: Deploy and Validate
steps.description: Push to production immediately. Your goal is not perfection; it is the first user sign-up to validate the demand.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure the deployment pipeline for Vercel and set up basic telemetry to track user drop-off rates.

pro_tips: Never build features before you have a landing page with a waitlist; if they won't sign up, they won't pay.
Use Claude Code to document your code as you write it; technical debt is the primary killer of founder-led startups.
Prioritize 'boring' problems. High-revenue SaaS apps often solve mundane, manual Excel tasks for small businesses.
Set a 72-hour 'kill switch.' If the MVP doesn't show traction or engagement in three days, pivot or scrap it.
Treat your project management board as your most important asset; if it's not in the task list, it doesn't exist.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is live, spend 80% of your time on distribution. Your code is finished, but your business is just beginning.
content.conversion_block: Stop building in the dark and start shipping products that generate recurring revenue. Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
